snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
вҖңNachanaвҖқ is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. рҹ’ғрҹҸҪрҹ•әрҹҸҪ
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take overвҖ”when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, вҖңNachanaвҖқ brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobodyвҖҷs watching.

рҹҺ§ Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

VZN
https://www.instagram.com/jhilkeyvzn/

Hennie Baker
https://www.instagram.com/bakerhennie/

Visuals by NFTP  

Producer-Shristi Karki (Shii) 
Director & Editor-Gaurav Bista   
DOP-Newjal Shrestha  Nhuja Shakya  
Production Manager-Shyam Khadka   
Choreographer-Kritika Baral   
Creative Director-Risheek Pradhan  
Assistant Director-Animesh Deep Shankar   
Casting Director-Rajeev Thapa  
Drone & FPV Pilot-Akash Regmi  
Editor-Gaurav Bista   
Coloring-NFTP  
PD/Art Director-Ghanashyam Shrestha  
Asst.Art-Gyanendra Tamang, Mohan Tamang, Shreeniwash Chaudhary,  Nitesh Gupta   
Asst. production-Anup Khadka, Mahesh GM  
Head Gaffer-Ganesh singh Thakuri  
Lights-Photon films and lights   
Camera rental-KathaChitra  
AC-Ganesh & Niraj Chettri  
Light Man-Madhu Khati(Dhrum), Chaudhary Dai And Team
Crane-LightBenders  
Crane Operators-Prashant Yogi, Bijaya Ramtel(Kale)
Crane Taker-Prakash Shudras
Crane Intern-Shantosh Pariyar   
BTS-XYZ   
Costume Designer-Sujan Ratna Pariyar   
Stylist-Sushmita Rijal (suzustyles)  
Costumes By-Veshbhusa Design studio
Sponsors-OV Education, Riva Natural Spring water  

Cast-PREMA LAMGADE, LIL JHOLA, YOGESHBEATS, LIL LHAKEY, Sujal Bhagat, Rajeev Thapa, XuZeyu Lama, Pramod Panta, Anjan Dhakal, 

Dancers-Lakpa Lama, Prithivu Bhujel, Jivan Lama, Suraj Biru, Aman, Alvish Lama, Dinesh, Jivan tamang  

Special Thanks-Shayuj Pokhrel, Abiskar Gautam, Nj Shakya  

Beat produced by Yogeshbeats
https://www.instagram.com/yogeshbeats/

Mix/Master by 4z
https://www.instagram.com/4zboi/

#jamesy #selfmade #nachana

snippet.description:
Movie: CID Bahu
Star Cast: Amrapali Dubey, Shweta Verma, Rambha Sahani,  Ayaz Khan, Vidhya Singh, Raj Singh Rajpoot, Puja Thakur, Sahil Siddique And Other

аӨ®аҘӮаӨөаҘҖ: аӨёаҘҖ.аӨҶаӨҲ.аӨЎаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘӮ
аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ: аӨҶаӨ®аҘҚаӨ°аӨӘаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ, аӨ¶аҘҚаӨөаҘҮаӨӨаӨҫ аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨ°аӨӮаӨӯаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨ№аӨЁаҘҖ, аӨ…аӨҜаӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ, аӨөаӨҝаӨҰаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨ°аӨҫаӨң аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ аӨ°аӨҫаӨңаӨӘаҘӮаӨӨ, аӨӘаҘӮаӨңаӨҫ аӨ аӨҫаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°, аӨёаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨІ аӨёаӨҝаӨҰаҘҚаӨҰаҘҖаӨ•аҘҖ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ
аӨ¬аҘҲаӨЁаӨ°: аӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨҜаӨ¶ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ®аҘҚаӨё PVT
аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨ• аӨ‘аӨЁ: аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ° 10 аӨ°аӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨІаӨҫ
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ: аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ® аӨ°аӨҫаӨҜ
аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•: аӨ…аӨЁаӨӮаӨңаӨҜ аӨ°аӨҳаҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨң
аӨӘаӨҹаӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ аӨө аӨёаӨӮаӨөаӨҫаӨҰ : аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨёаӨ№ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ: аӨ¶аӨҫаӨҮаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ
аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ: аӨёаӨҫаӨңаӨЁ аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ“аӨ® аӨқаӨҫ
аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ: аӨ§аӨ°аӨ® аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ, аӨҰаҘҒаӨ°аҘҚаӨ—аҘҮаӨ¶ аӨӯаӨҹаҘҚаӨҹ
аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ: аӨөаҘҮаӨӮаӨ•аҘҮаӨҹ аӨ®аӨ№аҘҮаӨ¶
аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ: аӨ—аҘҒаӨ°аӨңаӨӮаӨӨ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨЁаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨҜ: аӨҸаӨ® аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ (аӨңаҘүаӨҜ)
аӨ•аӨІаӨҫ: аӨЁаӨңаӨјаҘҖаӨ° аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ–
аӨ•аҘүаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨ®: аӨөаӨҝаӨ§аӨҫ-аӨөаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаҘҒ
аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ: аӨ‘аӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨІаҘҲаӨ¬
аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аҘҚаӨө аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ: аӨ…аӨёаӨІаӨ® аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ
аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ: аӨЁаӨҝаӨ№аӨҫаӨІ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨЎаҘҖ.аӨҶаӨҲ. аӨө  аӨөаҘҖ аӨҸаӨ« аӨҸаӨ•аҘҚаӨё : аӨ®аҘӢаӨ№аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ°
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨЈ аӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•: аӨ…аӨ®аӨ°аӨңаҘҖаӨӨ аӨҰаӨҫаӨё
аӨёаӨ№аӨҫаӨҜаӨ• аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•: аӨөаӨҝаӨөаҘҮаӨ• аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ°
аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨё: аӨ•аҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮаӨ°
аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨјаӨҫаӨҲаӨЁ: аӨЁаӨ°аҘҚаӨёаҘӮ

аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ: аӨ‘аӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨІаҘҲаӨ¬

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Firfirey | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
snippet.description:
Finally releasing 'Firfirey' after 6 years feels a lot, but here we are. I hope this brings back good memories to you as it does to me. This song resonates of pure love and the emotions it holds is immense for me. I can't believe we've come this far.

Thank you for always being a part of the journey !

Written, composed and performed by Yabesh Thapa 

Flute - Shrijan Maharjan
Drums and Additional Percussions - Bikesh Bazra
Mix/Master - Kobid Bazra (Bajra Creation Records)

Visuals by Noisy

snippet.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
Straw Hats! Grab your crew! ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE sets sail on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
NetflixвҖҷs epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2вҖ”unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand LineвҖ”a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the worldвҖҷs greatest treasure, theyвҖҷll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
NetflixвҖҷs live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on JapanвҖҷs highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of NetflixвҖҷs most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the ChildrenвҖҷs & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. The show is created in partnership with Shueisha and is produced by Tomorrow Studios (an ITV Studios partner) and Netflix.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81218765

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the worldвҖҷs leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: Minions & Monsters - Official Big Game Spot (2026)
snippet.description:
Watch the Big Game Spot for Minions & Monsters, a new installment in the animated film franchise distributed by Illumination. The film embarks on a new adventure within the Minions universe with all-new characters in Minions & Monsters, in theaters on July 1.

This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created. 

Minions & Monsters is directed by Academy AwardВ® nominee Pierre Coffin, a director of the first three Despicable Me films and the first Minions film. Coffin has also provided the voice for the Minions since their film debut in 2010. The film is written by Brian Lynch (Minions, The Secret Life of Pets films) and Pierre Coffin and is produced by IlluminationвҖҷs Academy AwardВ® nominated founder and CEO Chris Meledandri and by Bill Ryan (executive producer, The Super Mario Bros. Movie). The executive producer is Brian Lynch.

Minions & Monsters is in theaters on July 1.

#IGN

snippet.title: Ko Xa Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. ItвҖҷs a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams вҖ” thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

snippet.title: Subedaar - Official Teaser | Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Subedaar Official Teaser 
Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik
Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages вҖ“ including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal вҖ“ The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime VideoвҖҷs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures вҖ“ Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#subedaar #SubedaarOnPrime #anilkapoor #teaser #officialteaser #movie #primevideoindia

snippet.title: Rikesh Gurung Keys - Ma Timrai Hu | Official Song
snippet.description:
Rikesh Gurung Keys - Ma Timrai Hu | Official Song

#matimraihu #newnepalisong #lovesongnepali 


Lyrics 

[ Sansar Feriyo Timro Ujyalole 
Man Mandirbho Timro Aagamanle ] - 2 
Badliyeka chhan Mero Ranga Haru 
Kaha Nai Janchhu Ma Timrai Ta Hu 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahirahu la 
Jati Badha , Aayeni Timrai Aghi Hula 

Bihanile Ghaam , Saajhale Juno 
Parkhirahe Jhai Parkhirahu 
Khola Jhai Timi , Kinara Bhaye Ma 
Bagirahnu , Malai Chhoyi Rahanu 

[Maya Yo Sadhai Bhari 
Bagi Bagi Bagi Rahos 
Timimai Timimai 
Sansar Chali Rahos ] - 2 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahula 
Jati Badha Aayeni , Timrai Aghi Hula

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] ONLY FRIENDS : DREAM ON
snippet.description:
Romeo & Romeo аёҘаё°аё„аёЈа№Җаё§аё—аёөаё—аёөа№Ҳаё–аё№аёҒаёҷаёіаёЎаёІаё”аёұаё”а№ҒаёӣаёҘаёҮаёҲаёІаёҒаё§аёЈаёЈаё“аёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎаёӘаёёаё”аё„аёҘаёІаёӘаёӘаёҙаёҒаёӯаёўа№ҲаёІаёҮ Romeo & Juliet а№Ӯаё”аёўаёҷаёұаёҒаёЁаё¶аёҒаё©аёІаёҠаёұа№үаёҷаёӣаёө 4 а№ҒаёҲа№Үаё„ (а№ҖаёӯаёҙаёЈа№Ңаё— аёһаёҙаёЈаёһаёұаё’аёҷа№Ң) аё—аёөа№ҲаёӯаёўаёІаёҒаё•аёөаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№ғаё«аёЎа№Ҳа№ғаёҷаёҡаёЈаёҙаёҡаё—аёӮаёӯаёҮаёңаё№а№үаёҠаёІаёўаёӘаёӯаёҮаё„аёҷаё—аёөа№ҲаёЈаёұаёҒаёҒаёұаёҷ а№Ӯаё”аёўаёЎаёө аё”аёөаёҷ (аёЎаёҙаёҒаёӢа№Ң аёӘаё«аё аёІаёһ) аёҷаёұаёҒа№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮаё„аё№а№ҲаёҡаёёаёҚаёӮаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҲа№Үаё„аё„аё§аёҡаё•аёіа№Ғаё«аёҷа№ҲаёҮа№Ғаёҹаёҷа№ҖаёҒа№ҲаёІаё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёҮа№ҖаёҘаёҙаёҒаёҒаёұаёҷа№„аёӣаё•аёӯаёҷаёӣаёөаёӘаёІаёЎ а№ҒаёҘаё° аёЈаёІаёҹаёҹаёөа№Ҳ (аёҡаё№аёЎ аёҳаёЈаёІаёҳаёЈ) а№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҷаёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаё„аё“аё°аё—аёөа№Ҳа№ҒаёӯаёҡаёҠаёӯаёҡа№ҒаёҲа№Үаё„аё•аёұа№үаёҮа№Ғаё•а№Ҳаёӣаёөаё«аёҷаё¶а№ҲаёҮ а№ҒаёҘаё° аёӯаёІа№ӮаёҷаёҘаё”а№Ң (аёҲаёӯаёӘ а№Җаё§аёӯаёІаё«а№Ң) аё«аёҷаёёа№ҲаёЎаё«аёҘа№Ҳаёӯа№ҖаёӯаёҒа№Җаё•а№үаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ аё•аёұа№үаё§ (аёҒаё§аёҙаёҷ а№Ғаё„аёӘаёҒаёөа№ү) аёЈаё№аёЎа№ҖаёЎаё—аёӮаёӯаёҮаё”аёөаёҷ а№Ғаёҷаё°аёҷаёіа№ғаё«а№үаёЎаёІаёӯаёӯаё”аёҙаёҠаёұаёҷа№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—а№Җаёӣа№Үаёҷ вҖңа№ӮаёЈаёЎаёҙа№ӮаёӯвҖқ аё—аёұа№үаёҮаёӘаёӯаёҮаё„аёҷ аёҷаёӯаёҒаёҲаёІаёҒаёҷаёұа№үаёҷаёўаёұаёҮаёЎаёө а№ӮаёЈаёЎ (аёӯаё№а№Ӣ аёҳаёҷаёҡаё№аёЈаё“а№Ң) аё«аёҷаёёа№ҲаёЎаё„аёІаёЈаёЎаё”аёөа№ҖаёӯаёҒаё”аёҷаё•аёЈаёөаёЎаёІаёЈа№Ҳаё§аёЎаё—аёіаёҘаё°аё„аёЈа№Җаё§аё—аёөа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёҷаёөа№үаё”а№үаё§аёў аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎа№ҖаёЈаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҮаёЈаёІаё§аёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёіаёҘаё°аё„аёЈа№Җаё§аё—аёөаёӮаёӯаёҮа№ҒаёҒа№ҠаёҮа№Җаёһаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҷаёЎаё«аёІаёҘаёұаёўаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎаёҒаёұаёҡаёҒаёІаёЈаё—аёіаё•аёІаёЎаё„аё§аёІаёЎаёқаёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳаё•а№үаёӯаёҮа№ғаёҠа№үа№ғаёҲа№ғаёҷ  вҖңOnly Friends : Dream OnвҖқ аё—аёёаёҒаё§аёұаёҷаёЁаёёаёҒаёЈа№Ң а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ 20:30 аёҷ. аё”аё№аё—аёөаё§аёө аёҠа№ҲаёӯаёҮаё§аёұаёҷ31 |  аё”аё№аёўа№үаёӯаёҷаё«аёҘаёұаёҮ а№Ғаёӯаёӣ oneD аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§ а№Җаё§аёҘаёІ 21:30 аёҷ. а№ҖаёЈаёҙа№ҲаёЎ 27 аёҒаёёаёЎаё аёІаёһаёұаёҷаёҳа№Ңаёҷаёөа№ү

аёҒаёіаёҒаёұаёҡаёӢаёөаёЈаёөаёӘа№Ң : аё аёҙаёҚаёҚаёІ аёҲаё№а№Ҳаё„аёіаёЁаёЈаёө

аёЈаёІаёўаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёҷаёұаёҒа№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮ
а№ҖаёӯаёҙаёЈа№Ңаё— аёһаёҙаёЈаёһаёұаё’аёҷа№Ң аё§аёұаё’аёҷа№ҖаёЁаёЈаё©аёӘаёҙаёЈаёҙ  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  а№ҒаёҲа№Үаё„
аёЎаёҙаёҒаёӢа№Ң аёӘаё«аё аёІаёһ аё§аёҮаёЁа№ҢаёЈаёІаё©аёҺаёЈа№Ң  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аё”аёөаёҷ
аёҲаёӯаёӘ а№Җаё§аёӯаёІаё«а№Ң а№ҒаёӘаёҮа№ҖаёҮаёҙаёҷ  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аёӯаёІа№ӮаёҷаёҘаё”а№Ң
аёҒаё§аёҙаёҷ а№Ғаё„аёӘаёҒаёөа№ү  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аё•аёұа№үаё§
аёӯаё№а№Ӣ аёҳаёҷаёҡаё№аёЈаё“а№Ң а№ҖаёҒаёөаёўаёЈаё•аёҙаёҷаёҙаёЈаёұаёҷаё”аёЈа№Ң  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  а№ӮаёЈаёЎ
аёҡаё№аёЎ аёҳаёЈаёІаёҳаёЈ аёҲаёұаёҷаё—аёЈаё§аёЈаёҒаёІаёҚаёҲаёҷа№Ң  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аёЈаёІаёҹаёҹаёөа№Ҳ   
аёӘаёёаё”аёўаёӯаё” аёһаёұаёҗаёӘаёҙаёҸ а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёһаё№аёҘаёӘаё§аёұаёӘаё”аёҙа№Ң  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аё—аёҙаёЎаёЎаёөа№Ҳ
аёҷаёөа№Ӯаёӯ аё•аёЈаёұаёў аёҷаёҙа№ҲаёЎаё—аё§аёұаё’аёҷа№Ң  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аёҡаёӯаёӘаё•аёұаёҷ
аёҹаёҘаёёа№Ҡаё„ аё“аёұаёҗаёҷаёҷаё—а№Ң аё—аёӯаёҮа№ҒаёӘаёҮ  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аёһаёөаё—
аёӣа№Ҡаёӯаё” аёЁаёёаё аёҒаёЈ аёЁаёЈаёөа№Ӯаёһаёҳаёҙа№Ңаё—аёӯаёҮ  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  а№ҖаёҒаёЎа№ҖаёһаёҘаёўа№Ң

аё•аёҙаё”аё•аёІаёЎаё—аёёаёҒаё„аё§аёІаёЎа№Җаё„аёҘаё·а№Ҳаёӯаёҷа№„аё«аё§аёӮаёӯаёҮ GMMTV а№„аё”а№үаё—аёөа№Ҳ

аёӯаё№а№Ӣ аёҳаёҷаёҡаё№аёЈаё“а№Ң а№ҖаёҒаёөаёўаёЈаё•аёҙаёҷаёҙаёЈаёұаёҷаё”аёЈа№Ң  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  а№ӮаёЈаёЎ
аёҡаё№аёЎ аёҳаёЈаёІаёҳаёЈ аёҲаёұаёҷаё—аёЈаё§аёЈаёҒаёІаёҚаёҲаёҷа№Ң  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аёЈаёІаёҹаёҹаёөа№Ҳ   
аёӘаёёаё”аёўаёӯаё” аёһаёұаёҗаёӘаёҙаёҸ а№Җаёһаёҙа№ҲаёЎаёһаё№аёҘаёӘаё§аёұаёӘаё”аёҙа№Ң  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аё—аёҙаёЎаёЎаёөа№Ҳ
аёҷаёөа№Ӯаёӯ аё•аёЈаёұаёў аёҷаёҙа№ҲаёЎаё—аё§аёұаё’аёҷа№Ң  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аёҡаёӯаёӘаё•аёұаёҷ
аёҹаёҘаёёа№Ҡаё„ аё“аёұаёҗаёҷаёҷаё—а№Ң аё—аёӯаёҮа№ҒаёӘаёҮ  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  аёһаёөаё—
аёӣа№Ҡаёӯаё” аёЁаёёаё аёҒаёЈ аёЁаёЈаёөа№Ӯаёһаёҳаёҙа№Ңаё—аёӯаёҮ  аёЈаёұаёҡаёҡаё—  а№ҖаёҒаёЎа№ҖаёһаёҘаёўа№Ң

snippet.description:
Presenting вҖңPaan Ki DukaanвҖқ song, from the Upcoming Film "O'Romeo'. Starring Shahid Kapoor, Triptii Dimri, Avinash Tiwary, Farida Jalal, Vikrant Massey (Special Appearance), Nana Patekar, Tamannaah Bhatia, Disha Patani, Aruna Irani, Hussain Dalal & Rahul Deshpande.

snippet.title: Meri Ujeli (Official Music Video) -  Pahenlo Batti Muni
snippet.description:
Meri Ujeli is an ode to the brightness and warmth weвҖҷve received from all those we have loved and those who have loved us. 

Stream the HQ Audio here: https://silentroar.ffm.to/meriujeli-pbm

Lyrics:
аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨ¶аӨІаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ—аҘҮаӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаӨҫаӨЁаҘҖаӨ•аҘӢ аӨЁаӨҝ
аӨёаӨҫаӨҘаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҝаӨҰаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЈаҘҖ

аӨңаӨҷаҘҚаӨ—аӨІ аӨ–аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӯаӨҸаӨӘаӨӣаӨҝ
аӨҹаҘҒаӨёаӨҫаӨүаӨҒаӨӣ аӨңаҘҒаӨЁ аӨ«аҘӮаӨІ аӨ¬аӨёаӨЁаҘҚаӨӨ аӨ¬аӨЁаҘҖ

аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ,
аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ

аӨ¶аӨ№аӨ°аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҡаӨ°аҘҚвҖҚаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢаӨІаӨҫаӨ№аӨІаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ
аӨҡаӨҝаӨ°аҘҮаӨ° аӨ—аӨҫаӨүаӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨ—аӨІаҘҚаӨІаҘҖ-аӨ—аӨІаҘҚаӨІаҘҖаӨӯаӨҝаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҡаҘӢаӨ•аӨёаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨҸаӨ• аӨӘаӨ№аҘҮаӨІаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҢ, аӨЁаӨҜаӨҫаӨҒ аӨҰаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨҒ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ

аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ,
аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ

аӨ¬аӨёаӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ—аҘӢаӨҒаӨ§аҘӮаӨІаҘҖаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ…аӨҒаӨ—аӨҫаӨІаҘӢаӨёаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨЁаҘӢ аӨӣаҘҢ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨүаӨңаҘҮаӨІаҘҖ

аӨңаҘӮаӨЁаӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаӨҷаҘҚаӨ—аӨҝаӨЁаҘҖ, аӨ¬аӨ—аҘҲаӨҒаӨҡаӨҫаӨқаҘҲаӨҒ аӨ°аӨҷаҘҚаӨ—аҘҖаӨІаҘҖ,
аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫаӨқаҘҲаӨҒ аӨӣаҘҢ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨүаӨңаҘҮаӨІаҘҖ

аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨүаӨңаҘҮаӨІаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨүаӨңаҘҮаӨІаҘҖ
аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨүаӨңаҘҮаӨІаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ, аӨӨаӨҝаӨ®аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨүаӨңаҘҮаӨІаҘҖ

snippet.title: I Became King of the Unstable SMP
snippet.description:
After Lettuce paused the Unstable SMP election and declared himself the interim leader, he captured me and my best friend Theo. Now I have to start from scratch, escape, save Theo, and defeat Lettuce. This is How I Became King of the Unstable SMP. 

Unstable SMP:
вһң вҖӘ  вҖӘ@wemmbumc 
вһң вҖӘ  вҖӘ@FlameFragsMC 
вһң вҖӘ  @Spokeishere 
вһң вҖӘ  вҖӘ@ParrotX2 

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird @LettuceK @Boosfer @PurpledMC @wemmbumc @FlameFragsMC @Spokeishere @jumperwho @minutetechmc @JadenMAN @PrinceZam @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @Leowook 

Original Music by @tsynphonia 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

snippet.title: Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh
snippet.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

рқ‘Ёрқ’ғрқ’җрқ’–рқ’• рқ’•рқ’үрқ’Ҷ рқ‘Ҫрқ’Ҡрқ’…рқ’Ҷрқ’җ :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldnвҖҷt resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

рҹ‘ү рқ‘әрқ’–рқ’ғрқ’”рқ’„рқ’“рқ’Ҡрқ’ғрқ’Ҷ рқ’•рқ’җ @рқ‘№рқ‘«рқ‘Әрқ‘ҙрқ’Ҷрқ’Қрқ’җрқ’…рқ’Ҡрқ’Ҷрқ’” рқ’Үрқ’җрқ’“ рқ’Һрқ’җрқ’“рқ’Ҷ рқ’“рқ’җрқ’Һрқ’Ӯрқ’Ҹрқ’•рқ’Ҡрқ’„ рқ’үрқ’Ҡрқ’•рқ’” рқ’Ӯрқ’Ҹрқ’… рқ’Ҹрқ’Ҷрқ’ҳ рқ’“рқ’Ҷрқ’Қрқ’Ҷрқ’Ӯрқ’”рқ’Ҷрқ’”!

рҹҺ¶ рқ‘әрқ‘¶рқ‘өрқ‘® рқ‘Әрқ‘№рқ‘¬рқ‘«рқ‘°рқ‘»рқ‘ә :-
Singer:  Krish & Kishore Mondal 
Starring: Sanam Johar & Ashi Singh
Lyrics: Kunaal Vermaa
Producer: Durgaram Choudhary
Music Composer: Devv Sadaana
Music Arrangement & Programming: Sharan Rawat
Mixing & Mastering: Bhasker Sarma @ Euphony Studio
В©пёҸ Koo Koo Tv 
Digital Partner: RDC Media

рқ‘ірқ‘°рқ‘Ірқ‘¬, рҹ’¬ рқ‘Әрқ‘¶рқ‘ҙрқ‘ҙрқ‘¬рқ‘өрқ‘» рқ’ҡрқ’җрқ’–рқ’“ рқ’Үрқ’Ӯрқ’—рқ’җрқ’“рқ’Ҡрқ’•рқ’Ҷ рқ’Қрқ’Ҡрқ’Ҹрқ’Ҷ, рқ’Ӯрқ’Ҹрқ’… рҹ”Ғ рқ‘әрқ‘Ҝрқ‘Ёрқ‘№рқ‘¬ рқ’Ҡрқ’• рқ’ҳрқ’Ҡрқ’•рқ’ү рқ’ҡрқ’җрқ’–рқ’“ рқ’Үрқ’“рқ’Ҡрқ’Ҷрқ’Ҹрқ’…рқ’”.

рҹҺ¬ рқ‘Әрқ‘Ёрқ‘әрқ‘» & рқ‘Әрқ‘№рқ‘¬рқ‘ҫ :-
Director: Honey
Choreographer: Debu
Director of Photography (DOP): Karan
Project Head: Israr Ahmad
Video Creator: Screenshot Digital

Assistant Directors:
Shivani, Mukesh Tiwari

Still Photography & BTS: Chand Khan
DI (Colorist): Aman Kumar Kashyap
VFX: Mega Motion

Make-up & Hair: Guddu
Casting Director: Mujeeb Khan

Post Production: Screenshot Digital Studio
Editor: Aaditya Jangid
Art Director: Manoj Bhoyar

Production Executive: Ghani
Dressman: Sujeet
Costume Stylist: Adil Apperal
Dancer Costumes: Nishita
Dancer Management: Nikunj

Spot Boys: Anis, Madan

рқ‘ірқ’ҡрқ’“рқ’Ҡрқ’„рқ’” :
Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye

Na dil se vo yaadein jaayein
Na raaton ko neendein aayein
Aate hain phir khwab kyu
Aate hain kyu khaab
Jo thi tere ishq mein doobi
Un ankhon mein tum le aaye
Aasu behisaab kyu
Aasu behisaab
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Inkaar ke bahaane kayi baar karte karte

Humne wahin lagaya dil
Jahaan dil lagana mana tha
Akhir wahin kiye sajde jahan
Sar jhukana mana tha
Kyu zindagi bita di jahaan pe
ik pal bitaana mana tha

snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 рҹ’һ 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҶаӨөаӨҫаӨңаӨј аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨөаҘӢ аӨ®аӨҝаӨ аӨҫаӨё аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨңаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨңаӨ—аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨ®аҘӢаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаҘӢ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аҘӮаӨ№ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨңаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҲаӨӮ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ®аҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫ аӨүаӨ аӨҫ,

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаҘӢ аӨңаҘҖаӨЁаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЎаӨјаӨҫ, аӨөаҘӢ аӨңаҘҖаӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аӨ° аӨІаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ, аӨ…аӨ§аҘӮаӨ°аӨҫ-аӨёаӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҶаӨҒаӨ–аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨңаҘӢ аӨ—аӨ№аӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨүаӨёаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ№аҘҲ,

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨ®аҘӢаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаҘӢ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аҘӮаӨ№ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨңаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҲаӨӮ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ®аҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫ аӨүаӨ аӨҫ,
аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҰаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӣаҘӮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨ–аӨ° аӨүаӨ аӨҫаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаҘӢ аӨңаҘҖаӨЁаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЎаӨјаӨҫ, аӨөаҘӢ аӨңаҘҖаӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аӨ° аӨІаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ, аӨ…аӨ§аҘӮаӨ°аӨҫ-аӨёаӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨӯаҘҖ, аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҸаӨ№аӨёаӨҫаӨё аӨ°аӨ№аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨ№аӨ° аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ® аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ, аӨёаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҫаӨё аӨ°аӨ№аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ–аӨјаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨ° аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӯаҘҖ, аӨ®аӨ№аӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ«аҘӮаӨІ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҡаӨІаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аӨ° аӨ®аӨӮаӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ§аҘӮаӨІаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҶаӨҒаӨ–аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨңаҘӢ аӨ—аӨ№аӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨүаӨёаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ•аӨј аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫаӨ№аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨ№аӨҡаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ°аӨҫаӨ№аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӣ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ, аӨ…аӨ—аӨ° аӨӨаҘӮ аӨ®аҘҒаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨҸ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ–аӨјаҘҒаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨё, аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¬аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ° аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ–аӨҫаӨ®аҘӢаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаҘӮаӨҒ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨҶаӨҒаӨёаҘӮ аӨҡаӨІ аӨӘаӨЎаӨјаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ,
аӨ•аӨӯаҘҖ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ–аӨјаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ¬аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ–аҘӢ аӨңаӨҫаӨҠаӨҒ, аӨӨаҘӢ аӨІаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аҘҮ аӨҘаӨ® аӨӘаӨЎаӨјаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨӯаҘҖ, аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨ№аӨ° аӨӨаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӯаҘҖ, аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ¬аӨё аӨҮаӨӨаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ№ аӨҰаҘӮаӨҒ аӨӨаҘҒаӨқаӨёаҘҮ, аӨІаҘҢаӨҹ аӨҶ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ, аӨҹаҘӮаӨҹаҘҮ аӨӘаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаҘҮ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҖаӨөаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮаҘӨ
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ, аӨҰаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ,
аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҶаӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ, аӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҰаӨҝаӨІ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨҒаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫвҖҰ (2)

snippet.title: Franklin Traps ALL DEADLY GHOST Inside Evil Watch in Indian Bike Driving 3D! рҹҳұ
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Traps ALL DEADLY GHOST Inside Evil Watch in Indian Bike Driving 3D! рҹҳұ

In this story, Shinchan and Franklin get trapped inside another world created by the Evil Watch. The demon inside the watch traps them and takes Shinchan away with him. To save Shinchan, Franklin must trap all the ghosts and monsters that were released from the Evil Watch back inside it. These include Granny, Huggy Wuggy, Mr. Meat, Choo-Choo Charles, Kamla , and the Pennywise. Will Franklin be able to save Shinchan or not? Watch the full scary story to find out!

snippet.title: Gehra Hua - 8K Video | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Sara A, Shashwat Sachdev, Arijit Singh, Irshad K
snippet.description:
Pure emotion Pure romance Gehra Hua by Arijit Singh in stunning 8K.

рҹ‘ү Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Jio Studios Presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR

Written, Directed and Produced by: Aditya Dhar
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by: Lokesh Dhar

Cast: Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, Akshaye Khanna, R. Madhavan, Arjun Rampal, Sara Arjun

A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Composed, Produced and arranged by Shashwat Sachdev 
Singer: Arijit Singh, Armaan Khan 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma
Music producers: Sayantan Guha, Yash Singh
Bassist: Mohini Dey 
Tabla: Fateh Mohammed Sulemani
Sarangi: Momin Khan

snippet.title: Ekdev Limbu - Mana Ko Haal [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Mana Ko Haal is a heartfelt portrayal of love, vulnerability, and the unspoken emotions that live quietly within us. Through raw melodies and sincere lyrics, we have tried to capture the fragile state of a heart caught between longing, hope, and truth. The visuals mirror this emotional journey, bringing to life moments of connection, distance, and reflection that many hearts will recognize as their own. 

Follow Ekdev:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ekdev.limbu/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EkdevLimbuThegim/

Cast: Mahek Shrestha

snippet.title: аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ 2 | Guddu Rangila аӨ•аӨҫ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ 2026 | Kalyug Ke Holi 2 - New Bhojpuri Holi Song
snippet.description:
аӨ¬аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘӢ аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ "аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ°аӨӮаӨ— аӨЎаӨҫаӨҮаӨ®аӨӮаӨЎ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨҫаӨ° аӨ—аҘҒаӨЎаҘҚаӨЎаҘӮ аӨ°аӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨІаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨӮаӨҳ" 
аӨӯаӨ°аӨӘаҘӮаӨ° аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨӨаӨЎаӨјаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҶ аӨ—аӨҮаӨІ аӨ¬аӨҫаҘӨ
аӨ–аҘӮаӨ¬ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝ аӨңаӨҫ аӨҶ аӨўаҘҮаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨҶ аӨҶаӨ¶аҘҖаӨ°аҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҰаҘҖаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ рҹ”Ҙ

Lyrics:-
             аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аҘңаӨҫ-
аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӘаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӘаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨ№аӨөаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨүаӨ№аӨөаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӘаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ - 2
             аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫ - 01
аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ–аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ   
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ–аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ–аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ
аӨӯаӨҫаӨ— аӨ—аӨҲаӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаҘңаҘҖ аӨҰаӨ®аӨҰаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ 
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨҰаӨ®аӨҰаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҰаӨ®аӨҰаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ 
аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ–аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ   
аӨӯаӨҫаӨ— аӨ—аӨҲаӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаҘңаҘҖ аӨҰаӨ®аӨҰаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ
аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨ№аӨӮаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҰаӨ®аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҫаӨӣаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӘаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ - 2
               аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫ - 02
аӨ№аӨҫаӨҜ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨҮ аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ•аӨ№аӨөаӨҫ аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҲ

аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӘаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӘаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨ№аӨөаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨүаӨ№аӨөаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ 
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӘаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ - 2
             аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫ - 01
аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ–аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ   
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ–аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ–аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ
аӨӯаӨҫаӨ— аӨ—аӨҲаӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаҘңаҘҖ аӨҰаӨ®аӨҰаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ 
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨҰаӨ®аӨҰаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨҰаӨ®аӨҰаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ 
аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ§аҘӢаӨ–аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ   
аӨӯаӨҫаӨ— аӨ—аӨҲаӨІ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аӨҫаҘңаҘҖ аӨҰаӨ®аӨҰаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аҘҮ
аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨ№аӨӮаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҰаӨ®аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҫаӨӣаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӘаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ - 2
               аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫ - 02
аӨ№аӨҫаӨҜ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨҮ аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ•аӨ№аӨөаӨҫ аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҲ 
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨ•аӨ№аӨөаӨҫ аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ•аӨ№аӨөаӨҫ аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҲ
аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҲаӨҜаҘҮ аӨ°аҘӢаӨң аӨ–аӨҫаӨҲ 
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨ®аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ°аҘӢаӨң аӨ–аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ°аҘӢаӨң аӨ–аӨҫаӨҲ 
аӨ№аӨҫаӨҜ аӨ°аҘҮ аӨҮ аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ•аӨ№аӨөаӨҫ аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҲ 
аӨ¬аҘҮаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ®аӨҫаӨҲаӨҜаҘҮ  аӨ°аҘӢаӨң аӨ–аӨҫаӨҲ 
аӨёаӨёаҘҒаӨҲ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ°аҘӢаӨң аӨ–аҘҮаӨӨаӨөаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ
аӨ•аҘӢаҘҰ- аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӘаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ 
аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨҘаӨӨаӨҫ - 2

Lyrics for "Justin Bieber - What Do You Mean"

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? Oh, what do you mean?
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean?
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean?
Better make up your mind, what do you mean?

[Verse 1]
YouвҖҷre so indecisive of what I'm sayin'
Tryna catch the beat, make up your heart
Don't know if you're happy or complainin'
Don't want for us to end, where do I start?

[Pre-Chorus]
First you wanna go to the left, then you wanna turn right (Right)
Wanna argue all day, makin' love all night (All night)
First you're up, then youвҖҷre down, and then between ('Tween)
Oh, I really wanna know

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? Oh, what do you mean?
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean?
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean?

[Verse 2]
YouвҖҷre overprotective when I'm leavin'
Tryna compromise, but I canвҖҷt win
You wanna make a point, but you keep preachin'
You had me from the start, won't let this end

[Pre-Chorus]
First you wanna go to the left, then you wanna turn right
(Turn right)
Wanna argue all day, makin' love all night (All night)
First you're up, then youвҖҷre down, and then between ('Tween)
Oh, I really wanna know

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh (Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah)
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? (Oh, what do you mean?) Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? (I wanna know, ooh)
Oh, what do you mean? (Ooh)
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean? (Oh, baby)
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean? (Don't be so selfish, baby, yeah, yeah) Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? (You're so confusin', baby) Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move (Hey), but you tell me to go
What do you mean? (Be more straightforward)
Oh, what do you mean? (Hey, ah, ah, ah)
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean? (Hey, ah, ah, ah)
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean?

snippet.title: Ruth B. - Dandelions (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Ruth B. - Dandelions
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
Maybe it's the way you say my name
Maybe it's the way you play your game
But it's so good, I've never known anybody like you
But it's so good, I've never dreamed of nobody like you

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Verse 2]
I think that you are the one for me
Cause it gets so hard to breathe
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so alive and free
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so happy

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Bridge]
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know?
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know that

[Chorus]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Outro]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine

snippet.title: аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаҘҮаӨ¶аӨІ аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ | аҘҗ аӨЁаӨ®: аӨ¶аӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨҜ, аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӘаҘҒаӨ° аӨ—аҘҢаӨ°аӨ® аӨ•аӨ°аҘҒаӨЈаӨҫаӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ°аӨ®, аӨҶаӨ¶аҘҒаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ¶аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨ• аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ–аӨ°, аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨ…аӨ®аҘғаӨӨаӨөаӨҫаӨЈаҘҖ аӨө аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨҡаӨҫаӨІаҘҖаӨёаӨҫ

#mahadevbhajan

#specialbhajan

#ShivBhajan #Mahadev #LordShiva #ShivShakti #Bholenath #DevotionalMusic #HarHarmahadev #Peacefulbhajan #SpiritualMind #ShivRatariSpecia #SubahSubahKeBhajan #NonstopSpecialBhajan


аҘҗ аӨЁаӨ®: аӨ¶аӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨҜ аӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°
аӨ®аӨ№аӨҫаӨ®аҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаҘҒаӨӮаӨңаӨҜ аӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°
аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӘаҘҒаӨ° аӨ—аҘҢаӨ°аӨ® аӨ•аӨ°аҘҒаӨЈаӨҫаӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ°аӨ®
аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨ…аӨ®аҘғаӨӨаӨөаӨҫаӨЈаҘҖ
аҘҗ аӨңаӨҜ аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨ“аӨ®аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ
аӨҶаӨ¶аҘҒаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ¶аӨ¶аӨҫаӨӮаӨ• аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ–аӨ°
аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨҡаӨҫаӨІаҘҖаӨёаӨҫ
аӨёаӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨөаӨ®аҘҚ аӨёаҘҒаӨӮаӨҰаӨ°аӨ®
аӨӯаҘӢаӨІаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨЁаӨ—аӨ°аҘҖ
аӨңаӨҝаӨё аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө 

Om Namah Shivaya, Karpuram Gauram, Nonstop Shiv Bhajna, Morning Shiv Bhajan, Bholenath Ji Ke Bhajan, Om Mangalam Omkaraa Mangalam, Shiv Dhun, аӨЁаҘүаӨЁаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘүаӨӘ аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ, аҘҗ аӨЁаӨ®: аӨ¶аӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨҜ аӨ®аӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ°, аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨ¶аӨ®аҘҚаӨӯаҘӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ®, SHiv Ke Rudrakshasanskar, Om Jay Shiv Omkara, аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨ…аӨ®аҘғаӨӨаӨөаӨҫаӨЈаҘҖ, Jis Bhajan Me Shiv Ka Naam, Shiv Mantra, аӨёаҘӢаӨ®аӨөаӨҫаӨ° аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ, Shiv Amritwani, аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӘаҘҒаӨ° аӨ—аҘҢаӨ°аӨ® аӨ•аӨ°аҘҒаӨЈаӨҫаӨөаӨӨаӨҫаӨ°, Shiv Bhakti Dhun, Jay Jay Baba Bholenath, Special Shiv Bhakti Bhajan, Subah Subah Le Shiv Ke Name, Add Free Shiv Nonstop Shiv Bhajan, аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ, аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаҘҮаӨ¶аӨІ аӨ¶аӨҝаӨө аӨӯаӨ•аҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӯаӨңаӨЁ, Top Shiv Bhajan, New Superhit Shiv Bhajan

snippet.title: Ed Sheeran - Perfect (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
вҳҖпёҸRadio ParadiseвҳҖпёҸ

рҹ“ұEd Sheeran - Perfect:
https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/track/0tgVpDi06FyKpA1z0VMD4v
https://youtu.be/cNGjD0VG4R8?si=T4A45O-LthAe-X2_

LYRIC
I found a love for me
Darling, just dive right in and follow my lead
I found a girl, beautiful and sweet
I never knew you were the someone waiting for me

'Cause we were just kids when we fell in love
Not knowing what it was
I will not give you up this time
Darling, just kiss me slow
Your heart is all I own
And in your eyes, you're holding mine

Baby I'm, dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
When you said you looked a mess
I whispered underneath my breath
But you heard it
Darling, you look perfect tonight

I found a woman, stronger than anyone I know
She shares my dreams, I hope that someday I'll share her home
I found a lover to carry more than just my secrets
To carry love, to carry children of our own

We are still kids, but we're so in love
Fighting against all odds
I know we'll be alright this time
Darling, just hold my hand
Be my girl, I'll be your man
I see my future in your eyes

Baby, I'm dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
When I saw you in that dress
Looking so beautiful
I don't deserve this
Darling, you look perfect tonight

Baby, I'm dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
I have faith in what I see
Now I know I have met an angel in person
And she looks perfect
I don't deserve this
You look perfect tonight

#EdSheeran #Perfect #Lyrics

localized.title: Ed Sheeran - Perfect (Lyrics)
localized.description:
вҳҖпёҸRadio ParadiseвҳҖпёҸ

Subscribe and stay connected to whatвҖҷs playing today.

рҹ“ұEd Sheeran - Perfect:
https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/track/0tgVpDi06FyKpA1z0VMD4v
https://youtu.be/cNGjD0VG4R8?si=T4A45O-LthAe-X2_

LYRIC
I found a love for me
Darling, just dive right in and follow my lead
I found a girl, beautiful and sweet
I never knew you were the someone waiting for me

'Cause we were just kids when we fell in love
Not knowing what it was
I will not give you up this time
Darling, just kiss me slow
Your heart is all I own
And in your eyes, you're holding mine

Baby I'm, dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
When you said you looked a mess
I whispered underneath my breath
But you heard it
Darling, you look perfect tonight

I found a woman, stronger than anyone I know
She shares my dreams, I hope that someday I'll share her home
I found a lover to carry more than just my secrets
To carry love, to carry children of our own

We are still kids, but we're so in love
Fighting against all odds
I know we'll be alright this time
Darling, just hold my hand
Be my girl, I'll be your man
I see my future in your eyes

Baby, I'm dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
When I saw you in that dress
Looking so beautiful
I don't deserve this
Darling, you look perfect tonight

Baby, I'm dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
I have faith in what I see
Now I know I have met an angel in person
And she looks perfect
I don't deserve this
You look perfect tonight

#EdSheeran #Perfect #Lyrics

RSVP & Guy In The Sky Pictures present #Kedarnath 
Starring: Sushant Singh Rajput, Sara Ali Khan, Nitish Bharadwaj, Alka Amin, Sonali Sachdev, Pooja Gor, Nishant Dahiya

Directed by: Abhishek Kapoor 
Produced by: Ronnie Screwvala & Pragya Kapoor

Editor: Chandan Arora 
Background Score: Hitesh Sonik 
Sound Designer: Allwin Rego & Sanjay Maurya.

Lyrics:
Jai Ho Jai Ho Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Aadi Dev Shankara
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Tere Jaap Ke Bina
(Bholenath Shankara)
Chale Ye Saans Kis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mera Karm Tu Hi Jaane
Kya Bura Hai Kya BhalaaвҖҰ
Tere Raaste Pe Main Toh
Aankh Moond Ke ChalaaвҖҰ

Tere Naam Ki Jot Ne
Saara Har Liya Tamas Mera

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvarah

Srishti Ke Janam Se Bhi
(O OвҖҰ)
Pehle Tera Vaas Tha
(O OвҖҰ)
Ye Jag Rahe Ya Naa Rahe
(O OвҖҰ)
Rahegi Teri Aastha
(O OвҖҰ)

Kya SamayвҖҰ Kya Pralay
Dono Mein Teri Mahaanta
MahaantaвҖҰ MahaantaвҖҰ

Seepiyon Ki Ontt Main
(Bholenath Shankara)
Motiyaan Ho Jis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Mere Mann Mein Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Basa Hai Uss Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mujhe Bharam Tha Jo Hai Mera
Tha Nahin Kabhi MeraвҖҰ

Arth Kya Nirarth Kya
Jo Bhi Hai Sabhi TeraвҖҰ
Tere Saamne Hai Jhuka
Mere Sar Pe Haath Rakh Tera
Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

Chandrama Lalaat Pe (O OвҖҰ)
Bhasm Hai Bhujaaon Mein (O OвҖҰ)
Vastra Baagh Chhaal Ka (O OвҖҰ)
Hai Khadau Paanv Mein (O OвҖҰ)

Pyaas Kya Ho Tujhe
Ganga Hai Teri Jataaon Mein
Jataaon MeinвҖҰ Jataaon MeinвҖҰ

Doosron Ke Waaste
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Sadaiv Hai Jiya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Pyala Vish Ka Tune Khud Piya

Lyrics: 
Lu hai Manungkotaima mero dil basyo lali othaimaa.
Lu hai manung kotaima najar nalagau lali othaima.

Pirati lam na ta Saili ghumna lai jamna ta.
Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

snippet.title: New Lunar New Year, Honourable Mentions  Pack Opening - FC MOBILE
snippet.description:
ItвҖҷs a HUGE Thursday in FC Mobile! We have 3 massive events live right now: Honorable Mentions, Jingga Week 2, and Lunar New Year!

TodayвҖҷs video is UNCUT and UNFILTERED. I went all in on the new packs to hunt for the best 117 OVR cards. We started strong with the Lunar New Year packs and pulled an insane 117 Buffon almost immediately!

Then, we shifted to Honorable Mentions where I packed the "Future GOAT" Lamine Yamal and Michael Olise. But the grind didn't stop there. I exchanged half my team (including Vini Jr and Harry Kane!) to get enough tokens to claim 117 Ruud Gullit and 117 Maicon to build a 119 OVR Super Squad.

рҹ”Ҙ PACK OPENING HIGHLIGHTS:

Lunar New Year: Packing 117 Buffon & Capdevila рҹҗү
Honorable Mentions: Pulling 117 Lamine Yamal & Olise рҹҢҹ
Zinga Week 2: The hunt for a Brazilian RB (Maicon) рҹҮ§рҹҮ·
The Exchange: Sacrificing 116+ OVR players for Tokens вҷ»пёҸ
The Upgrade: Claiming Gullit & Maicon for the squad!

en.title: New Lunar New Year, Honourable Mentions  Pack Opening - FC MOBILE
en.description:
ItвҖҷs a HUGE Thursday in FC Mobile! We have 3 massive events live right now: Honorable Mentions, Jingga Week 2, and Lunar New Year!

TodayвҖҷs video is UNCUT and UNFILTERED. I went all in on the new packs to hunt for the best 117 OVR cards. We started strong with the Lunar New Year packs and pulled an insane 117 Buffon almost immediately!

Then, we shifted to Honorable Mentions where I packed the "Future GOAT" Lamine Yamal and Michael Olise. But the grind didn't stop there. I exchanged half my team (including Vini Jr and Harry Kane!) to get enough tokens to claim 117 Ruud Gullit and 117 Maicon to build a 119 OVR Super Squad.

рҹ”Ҙ PACK OPENING HIGHLIGHTS:

Lunar New Year: Packing 117 Buffon & Capdevila рҹҗү
Honorable Mentions: Pulling 117 Lamine Yamal & Olise рҹҢҹ
Zinga Week 2: The hunt for a Brazilian RB (Maicon) рҹҮ§рҹҮ·
The Exchange: Sacrificing 116+ OVR players for Tokens вҷ»пёҸ
The Upgrade: Claiming Gullit & Maicon for the squad!

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвҖҷs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вҖ” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вҖ” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вҖңCapture the FlagвҖқ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вҖңRobuxвҖқ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

hi.title: аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨ®аҘҲаӨҡ аӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ аӨЎаӨҝаӨөаҘҖаӨңаӨЁ 1 аӨӨаӨ• аӨӘаӨ№аҘҒаӨӮаӨҡ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӮаӨҒ?
hi.description:
аӨ¬аҘҮаӨ№аӨӨаӨ°аҘҖаӨЁ аӨ«аҘҒаӨҹаӨ¬аҘүаӨІ аӨңаӨ°аҘҚаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аӨ® аӨҰаӨҫаӨ®аҘӢаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ° аӨӘаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ!
аӨөаҘҮаӨ¬аӨёаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ: https://www.johnsport.co/?ref=AL
аӨ•аҘӮаӨӘаӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢаӨЎ: 9AL аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҮаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҮаӨ®аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ 20% аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӣаҘӮаӨҹ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ

аӨҮаӨё аӨІаӨҝаӨӮаӨ• аӨёаҘҮ аӨ–аӨ°аҘҖаӨҰаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ° аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘӢ 20% аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӣаҘӮаӨҹ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨ—аҘҖ рҹҳҒ

аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ§аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜаӨөаӨҫаӨҰ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨҰаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨӨ рҹ”Ҙ

аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁ аӨӯаҘӮаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ:

вҖў аӨ…аӨ—аӨ° аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аӨ® аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ® аӨҸаӨ• аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аӨӮаӨёаҘҖ аӨҶаӨҲ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨ• аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ!

snippet.description:
Today I survived lava for brainrots! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Join this channel to get access to perks:

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвҖҷs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вҖ” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вҖ” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вҖңCapture the FlagвҖқ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вҖңRobuxвҖқ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn
